title: Helpers--Painters, Paperhangers, Plasterers, and Stucco Masons
description: Help painters, paperhangers, plasterers, or stucco masons by performing duties requiring less skill. Duties include using, supplying, or holding materials or tools, and cleaning work area and equipment.

tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform support duties to assist painters, paperhangers, plasterers, or masons.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply protective coverings, such as masking tape, to articles or areas that could be damaged or stained by work processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill cracks or breaks in surfaces of plaster articles or areas with putty or epoxy compounds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supply or hold tools and materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Smooth surfaces of articles to be painted, using sanding and buffing tools and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mix plaster, and carry plaster to plasterers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place articles to be stripped into stripping tanks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove articles such as cabinets, metal furniture, and paint containers from stripping tanks after prescribed periods of time.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Pour specified amounts of chemical solutions into stripping tanks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
